summary: Preview verification PASSED. https://delivery-sync-pro.preview.emergentagent.com/ returns HTTP 200, Expo web bundle renders within ~5s with no runtime/red-screen errors (only the pre-existing cosmetic RN-Web deprecation warnings: shadow* → boxShadow, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents). End-to-end mobile-viewport (390x844) Playwright run on real preview URL: (1) Login screen renders logo + email + password + Sign In with admin creds prefilled. (2) Sign In as admin@kushanji.com/Admin@123 navigates to /dashboard. (3) Dashboard shows all 4 KPI cards via testIDs kpi-today-deliveries / kpi-today-quantity / kpi-today-customers / kpi-month-deliveries, the Last 7 Days chart, Top Customers (This Month), Top Products section, and the ADMIN role badge (all visible in screenshot; testIDs `chart-7d`, `top-customers`, `top-products`, `role-badge-admin` are NOT wired so test-ID-based assertions failed — text-based assertions pass). (4) Bottom tabs switch correctly: Deliveries → /deliveries (add-delivery-fab ✓, deliveries-search-input ✓), Reports → /reports (report-generate-button ✓, report-type-customer ✓, report-type-driver ✓, report-type-product ✓), Settings → /settings (settings-row-profile ✓, settings-logout-button ✓). NOTE: bottom-tab pressables don't expose tab-deliveries/tab-reports/tab-settings testIDs — had to click via text; tab switching itself works correctly with each screen showing unique content. (5) Settings → Edit Profile renders Display Name / Email / Password cards at /profile. (6) Settings → Customer Database renders list + add-customer-fab. (7) Settings → Driver Database renders list + add-driver-fab. (8) Settings → User Management (admin) renders Administrator + Demo User rows. (9) Settings → Audit Log (admin) renders entries. (10) Settings → Deleted Deliveries renders Trash (30 days) with restore-able entries. (11) Logout returns to /login. (12) Logging in as user@kushanji.com/User@123 correctly HIDES settings-row-users, settings-row-audit, settings-row-business while keeping Profile/Customers/Drivers/Trash/Logout visible. The user-reported 'not able to preview' issue is RESOLVED.

issues: RN-Web deprecation warnings still surface in browser console: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow) and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' (use style.pointerEvents). Cosmetic only — does not break preview.

action_items: (LOW) Add missing testIDs to make automated regression more robust: `chart-7d` (Last 7 Days chart container), `top-customers` (Top Customers section), `top-products` (Top Products section), `role-badge-admin` (the ADMIN badge), and tab buttons `tab-dashboard` / `tab-deliveries` / `tab-reports` / `tab-settings` on the bottom tab bar. UI works — only test-coverage gap.
(LOW) Silence the two RN-Web deprecation warnings by migrating shadow* styles to boxShadow and `pointerEvents` prop to `style.pointerEvents` (no functional impact).
critical_code_review_comments: Login screen ships with admin credentials prefilled (`useState('admin@kushanji.com')` / `Admin@123`) — convenient for demo but should be gated behind __DEV__ or removed for production builds.
_layout.tsx uses LogBox.ignoreAllLogs(true) — masks all RN warnings including potentially useful ones; consider scoping to known cosmetic patterns.
seed_data_creation: None. Existing seeded customers (ABC Store, Sharma Kirana, XYZ Mart, Audit Test Store), drivers (Mahesh, Rajesh) and ~7 deliveries used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview at https://delivery-sync-pro.preview.emergentagent.com/ is fully operational on 390x844 mobile viewport. Login prefilled with admin creds. Auth uses /api backend; demo creds are admin@kushanji.com / Admin@123 and user@kushanji.com / User@123. All tab routes use /dashboard, /deliveries, /reports, /settings (Expo Router file-based). Sub-routes from Settings: /profile, /customers, /drivers, /users, /audit, /trash. testIDs are good for KPIs, FABs, form inputs, settings rows, and report-type chips, but missing for chart-7d/top-customers/top-products/role-badge-admin/tab-* — fall back to text selectors for those. Metro bundle ~1276 modules, builds in 681ms; cache located at /app/frontend/.metro-cache.
rca_of_issue: User report: 'not able to preview'. RCA confirmed by main agent: stale Metro cache + duplicate expo-router imports in (tabs)/_layout.tsx and customers.tsx after multiple supervisor restarts during build. Mitigation applied by main agent before this run: cleared /tmp/metro-*, /app/frontend/.expo, /app/frontend/node_modules/.cache, deduplicated imports, restarted expo. Verification (this iteration): HTTP 200 on `/`, supervisor log shows clean bundle (`Web Bundled 681ms ... 1276 modules`), no runtime errors in browser console, full UI tree mounts within ~5s, and every flow in the review_request is reachable and functional. Issue is resolved.
